title: Missing Pixels
description: Formerly known as fireflies mod, the mod adds new pixel bugs to your game. IT IS UPDATED TO 1.19.2!!!!!!!
body:
This is a simple 1.19.2 mod for minecraft that adds the fireflies that many people wanted! If you still want fireflies, this mod is for you.
Adds the following features:

-Firefly, A passive ambient mob

-Firefly item you get by right clicking a firefly

-Cricket, passive ambient mob

-Grasshopper, passive ambient mob

-Fly... passive.. ambient mob- yeah I think you get the idea

CRITICAL INFO: This mod may get updates!
